case_title: EUGENIA SALGUERO ET AL VS. RICARDO ALVA ET AL

docket_entries.description: QUIET TITLE - REAL PROPERTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SALGUERO, EUGENIA ADMINISTRATOR OF THE ESTATE OF ROSARIO ANAYA SOLIZ, CARLOTA ADMINISTRATOR OF THE ESTATE OF ROSARIO ANAYA AS TO DEFENDANT ALVA, RICARDO ALVA, GLADYS ALL OTHER PERSONS UNKNOWN, CLAIMING ANY LEGAL OR EQUITABLE RIGHT, TITLE, ESTATE, LIEN, OR INTEREST IN THE PROPERTY DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-29-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-27-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-06-2017
DECLARATION OF MICHAEL E. FREEDMAN IN SUPPORT OF DEFENDANTS RICARDO ALVA AND GLADYS ALVAS DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFFS COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 59924693) FILED BY DEFENDANT ALVA, RICARDO ALVA, GLADYS

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT RICARDO ALVA, GLADYS ALVA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION FOR QUIET TITLE, BREACH OF CONTRACT, MISREPRESENTATION, CONCEALMENT AND PARTITION. (THE COURT NOTES THAT NOTICE OF DEMURRER REFERENCES CAUSE OF ACTION FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF ON PAGE 2 AT LINE 2; THE GROUNDS FOR DEMURRER TO THIS CAUSE OF ACTION ARE NOT LISTED ON PAGE 2:6-5; AND NO SUCH DEMURRER IS SUPPORTED BY THE POINTS AND AUTHORITIES). PLAINTIFFS SHALL HAVE 10 DAYS TO ALLEGE FACTS IN SUPPORT OF EACH ELEMENT OF EACH CAUSE OF ACTION, E.G. THE FORMATION AND TERMS OF THE CONTRACT; FRAUD WITH PARTICULARITY, ETC. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PREPARE AND PROPERLY FILE REDACTED (SSN) VERSIONS OF TAX RETURNS BY NO LATER THAN MARCH 1, 2017. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: NEWTON J. LAM, CLERK: A. PASCUAL, NOT REPORTED (D501)
ORDER SUSTAINING DEFTS GENERAL DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT TO QUIET TITLE, DECLARATORY RELIEF, FRAUD-MISREPRESENTATION, FRAUD-CONCEALMENT, PARTITION (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) (COPY IN SASE)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS RICARDO ALVA, GLADYS ALVA'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES AN AGREEMENT AND BREACH OF THE AGREEMENT ALONG WITH A CLAIM FOR PARTIAL INTEREST IN THE PROPERTY BASED ON THE AGREEMENT. THIS CLAIM IS NOT BARRED BY THE CCP 319 AS THE LAST ELEMENT OF THE CLAIM, BREACH, HAS NOT OCCURRED UNTIL 2015. CONTRARY TO DEFENDANT'S ARGUMENT, THE RECORDATION OF THE DEED IN 1985 DID NOT COMPLETE ANY OF THE CAUSES OF ACTION AS ALLEGED IN THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS.) JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

Defendants Ricardo Alva And Gladys Alvas Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2017 Continued To Oct-25-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-19-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Pat Miller (415-585-2122) of Stuhr & Miller LLP for Plaintiff/opposing party Eugenia Salguero, et al.
No other appearances

Not Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs RICARDO ALVA, GLADYS ALVA's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. First Amended Complaint sufficiently alleges an agreement and breach of the agreement along with a claim for partial interest in the property based on the agreement. This claim is not barred by the CCP 319 as the last element of the claim, breach, has not occurred until 2015. Contrary to Defendant's argument, the recordation of the Deed in 1985 did not complete any of the causes of action as alleged in the First Amended Complaint. Order is signed in open court. (See Scanned Order for Details.) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-30-2017 Continued To Sep-06-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-31-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael E. Freedman (415-777-1666) for Defendant/Moving party Ricardo Alva and Gladys Alva.
No other appearances.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. Hearing is held. Argued re: formatting error. Defendant will re-notice the motion. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT RICARDO ALVA AND GLADYS ALVA'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. Defendants' brief is beyond the maximum permitted page limit under CRC 3.1113(d) and the parties do not comply with SFLR 2.7B. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2017 Continued To May-24-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-15-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
S. Patrick Miller (415-585-2122) of Stuhr & Miller, LLP for Plaintiff/ opposing party Eugenia Salguero Administrator of the Estate of Rosario Anaya.
Michael E. Freedman (415-777-1666) of Freedman Law Firm for Defendant/Moving party Ricardo Alva and Gladys Alva.

Hearing is held. Argued re: causes of action and "particularities". The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT RICARDO ALVA, GLADYS ALVA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend as to causes of action for quiet title, breach of contract, misrepresentation, concealment and partition. (The Court Notes that Notice of Demurrer references cause of action for declaratory relief on page 2 at line 2; the grounds for demurrer to this cause of action are not listed on page 2:6-5; and no such demurrer is supported by the Points and Authorities). Plaintiffs shall have 10 days to allege facts in support of each element of each cause of action, e.g. the formation and terms of the contract; fraud with particularity, etc. Plaintiff is ordered to prepare and properly file redacted (SSN) versions of tax returns by no later than March 1, 2017. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Newton J. Lam, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-13-2017 Continued To Feb-15-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT RICARDO ALVA and GLADYS ALVA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Continued to February 15, 2017. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of the operative complaint to department 501 no later than January 30, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)
